name: Build Up Studio SIGMA
notes:
More "retro" aesthetics, does not offer english ordering however orders can be placed via their website. One of the most veteran kigurumi mask makers. 

Sigma is known for its vintage aesthetics, does not offer english ordering however orders can be placed via their website. One of the most veteran kigurumi mask makers. 

 Generics have decently fast turnaround, customs expect ~2 years. A bit more hit or miss when it comes to non-generics. More basic styling than most modern makers when it comes to hair.
